Common.appTagline: Structured review for high-focus study groups.

Landing.heroEyebrow: Used by study group captains preparing for MCCQE1, USMLE and PLAB
Landing.heroDescription: ActiveBoard structures your group sessions and gives you a consistency history that shows who is really doing the work.
Landing.failuresQuote: “Once you are in the group, leaving is awkward, so our failing group lasted far too long.”
Landing.failureDominantDescription: One person answers first. Everyone else follows. No real practice under pressure.
Landing.failureGhostDescription: Members disappear without warning. There is no clean way to manage it.
Landing.howDescription: Bring your meeting tools, bring your qbanks, and use your phone as a second screen, like a real pop quiz.
Landing.howConstancyDescription: Every session leaves a visible record, so you can see who really shows up and keeps answering questions.
Landing.howLiveDescription: After 100 questions, live access unlocks. Find seats and join active groups.
Landing.builtBullet1: 4 years of USMLE, MCCQE and PLAB group dynamics
Landing.builtBullet2: Designed for WhatsApp and Discord communities
Landing.builtBullet3: Built around what serious candidates already do every week
Landing.builtQuote: “We were more productive in terms of questions answered per day.”
Landing.pricingTitle: Start free. Upgrade when it gets serious.
Landing.pricingUnlimitedFeature2: Full access to the Live list
Landing.founderPrice: Founder price locked at $15/month for one month. Ends May 1.
Landing.pricingFootnote: Ideal for May and fall exam sessions.
Landing.faqWhatsAppQuestion: Can’t we just do this on WhatsApp or Zoom?
Landing.faqWhatsAppAnswer: Those tools run the call. ActiveBoard runs the structure: answer commitment before discussion, automatic consistency tracking, and a clean record of who does the work.
Landing.faqQbankQuestion: Do we have to leave our qbank?
Landing.faqQbankAnswer: No. Keep UWorld, Amboss, CanadaQBank. ActiveBoard runs alongside them.
Landing.faqThresholdAnswer: Serious groups should be earned. The people you discover there have already shown proof of work.
Landing.faqMemberStopsQuestion: What happens when a member stops showing up?
Landing.faqMemberStopsAnswer: Their record shows it. ActiveBoard deactivates the account.
Landing.finalTitle: Ready to study with people who actually show up?
Landing.finalNote: Compatible with Zoom, Teams, Meet and any qbank. Free to start.
Landing.footerDescription: Not a question bank. An execution layer for serious group prep.

Billing.unlimitedActiveHint: Your unlimited plan is active. You can manage billing details in Stripe.
Billing.title: Billing
Billing.simpleDescription: A simplified billing path around your 100-question discovery session and the Lookup group list.
Billing.lookupActivationDescription: Add a card and subscribe to unlock the reliable but currently incomplete group list.
Billing.reliableGroupsDescription: After payment, ActiveBoard guides you toward incomplete reliable groups that can accept new members.
Billing.description: ActiveBoard gives every member 100 free answered questions. After that, a subscription is required to keep running sessions and unlock discovery.
Billing.trialProgress: {current} / {total} free questions used - {remaining} remaining before payment is required
Billing.trialProgressBanner: {remaining} questions remaining before billing becomes mandatory.
Billing.trialWarningBanner: {remaining} questions remaining. Subscribe now to avoid being blocked at 100 answered questions.
Billing.trialCompleteBanner: The 100-question free trial is complete. Billing is now required to continue core study flows.
Billing.paymentMethodHint: Attach a valid card so the account can move from locked to active once the subscription starts.
Billing.capabilitiesDescription: These are the product abilities currently available to this account.
Billing.cardAssociationDescription: This Stripe step stores a valid payment method only. During the free trial it does not change your tier. After 100 answered questions, it helps the account move from locked to dormant until a subscription is activated.
Billing.cardAssociationComplete: A valid payment method is already attached to this account.
Billing.cardAssociatedDuringTrial: A card is attached. Your account remains in trial until you reach 100 answered questions.
Billing.plansDescription: Choose the plan that keeps your certified status active. Billing management is available through Stripe's customer portal.
Billing.subscriptionRequiresCard: Add a payment method first before starting a subscription.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: Track your study volume, calibration, blueprint coverage, and personal improvement over time.

Offline.title: You're offline right now.
Offline.description: ActiveBoard can keep a minimal shell available when the network drops, but live session actions and authenticated requests need a connection.
Offline.bannerDescription: The app will keep static screens available, but session updates will resume only after the network returns.
Offline.tipRefresh: Reconnect to resume live sessions, answer submissions, and dashboard refreshes.
Offline.tipReconnect: If the connection is unstable, keep this tab open and retry once the network indicator returns.
Offline.tipFallback: This fallback page is cached locally so members still see a clear recovery path during outages.
